section_summary.headerTaglineOne: Ready to take your idea to the next level?
section_summary.headerTaglineFour: I design and build modern web and mobile experiences with React, TypeScript and React Native, focused on performance, usability and real results for users, brands and digital products.

section_projects.title: Experience
section_projects.subtitle: Projects I have worked on.
section_projects.description: I build web and mobile applications with polished interfaces, intuitive usability and a strong focus on user experience.

projects.name: Rivals
projects.description:
Rivals is a multi-sport mobile app for creating and managing sports teams. Users can sign up, create a profile or team, search rivals, manage matches, view standings and administer their sports profile.

My contribution as Mobile Software Developer

I led the complete mobile frontend development, from base architecture to build delivery. I worked on authentication, onboarding, team creation, profile management, rival search, match center, standings, health tests, design system, internationalization and EAS build configuration.

Technical highlights

  • Feature-first architecture with thin routes and reusable services, hooks and components.
  • Complex conditional navigation with auth guards and required onboarding flows.
  • Real-time state management with Firestore subscriptions and React Context.
  • Scalable multi-step forms with React Hook Form and Zod.
  • Smooth UX with React Native Reanimated, gesture handling and skeleton states.

projects.name: Abastella
projects.description:
Abastella Restaurantes is an operational and financial management platform for restaurants. It centralizes purchases, supplier invoices, inventories, recipes, raw material costs, payments and BI reports.

My contribution as frontend developer

I designed and built complex interfaces on top of a Firebase serverless architecture, including invoices, purchases, payments, inventory, ingredients, recipes, reports, admin tools, settings and onboarding flows.

Technical highlights

  • Interactive tables with TanStack Table, persistent selection, filters and batch actions.
  • Parametric Excel exports with currency formatting and multi-sheet reports.
  • Robust forms with react-hook-form and Zod.
  • Looker Studio embeds, support tooling and analytics integrations.
  • Atomic Design organization for a scalable and consistent interface.

section_aboutme.title: About me
section_aboutme.subtitle: A little about me
section_aboutme.description: Software developer with more than 5 years of experience building web and mobile applications, specialized in React, Next.js, TypeScript, React Native and GraphQL. I focus on efficient, scalable and user-centered solutions, working with agile methodologies. I enjoy continuous learning, tackling new challenges and collaborating on innovative, high-impact products.
